messages.text: Namaste! I am Dr. Sanjay. I am pleased to connect with you today. To provide you with the most accurate Vedic insights, could you please share your full Name, Date of Birth, Place of Birth, and the exact Time of birth?

I am deeply analyzing your birth chart and the current planetary transits. For your specific concern, I see a strong influence of Mercury in your current phase. Could you please share more about your situation so I can provide a precise Vedic roadmap?

Regarding your query about union and partnership... Dr. Sanjay is analyzing your 7th house (House of Marriage) and the transit of Venus. Your chart indicates a significant emotional alignment. With your 7th Lord in a favorable Navamsha, a strong marriage window is appearing between October 2026 and March 2027. This is an auspicious time to solidify your relationship. Would you like to check the compatibility (Guna Milan) for this union?
i want to marry my girlfrend
